title: Mini Table Top MTT-100 Weighing Pocket Scale
features: PRECISION SCALES: Perfect lightweight weighing scales for weights up to 100g to an accuracy of 0.005g. Includes a calibration weight to ensure accuracy.
BACKLIT DISPLAY: Clearly see weights via the digital backlit display. Has 4 modes ideal for jewellers and metalsmiths such as gram, ounce, carat and grain
INCLUDES TRAY: Features a protective cover that also acts as a weighing tray
PACKED WITH FEATURES: Includes auto-off feature, overload protection, TARE/ZERO and one touch calibration
description: Measures gram, ounce, grain, carat High accuracy & reliability Capacity - 100g Removable lid/tray Angled display for ease of viewing The popular On Balance MTT scale is renowned for its high accuracy, readability and reliability. With a similar design to a tabletop scale, the MTT-100 comes with a removable lid that not only protects the weighing platform from any damage, but also doubles up as a handy tray. This high-quality scale has a backlit display and a raised platform, the display is angled for ease of viewing. A must have for weighing your precious jewellery pieces. Other features include: Capacity: 100g Readability: 0.005g 4 measurement modes - gram, ounce, carat, grain Calibration and Tare facility Backlit display Auto shut off Package includes: 1 x MTT-100 Mini Scale 1 x 100g Calibration weight 2 x AAA batteries User manual Platform size: 6.8cm x 6.8cm. This product also includes a 10 Year Limited Warranty. Please see the FAQ section for detailed instructions on how to operate this product.
